name: Light & Wonder, Inc.
summary: Unless otherwise specified or the context otherwise indicates, all references to the words Light & Wonder, Light & Wonder, Inc., we, us, our and the Company refer to L&W and its consolidated subsidiaries. General L&W is a leading cross-platform global games company with a focus on content and digital markets headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada. Our portfolio of revenue-generating activities primarily includes supplying game content and gaming machines, CMSs and table game products and services to...
